landing.heroDescription: Fully digitize your operational workflows from field data entry via real-time inspection apps, all the way to final executive dashboards and automated KPI reporting.
landing.feature1Desc: A strict 5-stage hierarchical approval engine ensuring total accountability from inspector to catering manager.
landing.feature2Desc: 6 dedicated dashboard environments tailored strictly to the permissions of the logged-in personnel.
landing.feature3Desc: Camera alert integrations and automated incident reporting workflows across all active branch zones.
